text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yawn... All right, Marvelous. Let's get ready for bed.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Marvelous? What's up? You seem really into
that book.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: It's Marvelous Star Tales! ☆ This masterpiece is written by none other than me, Marvelous Sunday! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...There's a lot to unpack here, but okay. Let's just
go to bed.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All right, I get it now. I'm definitely in a dream.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Isn't it marvelous?! ☆ And guess what?
Starting today, you, too, are marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Aaaand that brings us to... the Marvelous
Chant! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What?! Why is my body moving?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, huh? What's with my footwork? My legs
aren't getting tired at all...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: If I did this in a race...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeesh... That dream was pure insanity.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But those moves... Hm... Maybe I should go for a
run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since that day, Nice Nature's running has
improved greatly!
